genvid_eos.name: GenvidEOS
genvid_eos.description: Integration of Epic Online Services API.

on-initialization-success.description: Trigger when the SDK has been initialized

on-initialization-error.description: Trigger when an error happens during initialization

on-login-persistent-success.description: Trigger when the Persistent Login is successful

on-login-persistent-error.description: Trigger when an error occured during Persistent Login

on-login-portal-success.description: Trigger when the Portal Login is successful

on-login-portal-error.description: Trigger when an error occured during Portal Login

on-logout-error.description: Trigger when an error occured during Logout

on-login-state-change.description: Trigger when the login state change

is-logged-in.description: Return if the user is actually logged in

is-initialized.description: Returns if the SDK has been initialized properly

on-network-change.description: Must be called when network state change

connected.name: Connected
connected.desc: Either the network is connected or not

login-persistent.description: Try to login with the persistent credentials from last login.

login-portal.description: Launch a browser session to login with Epic Portal

get-account-id.description: Return the account id of the user.

get-username.description: Return the Epic Username of the user

get-logging-status.description: Return the latest state of the login. Can be 'inProgress', 'loggedIn' or 'loggedOut'

get-token.description: Return the encoded token for the user.
